ookie/package.json\n./node_modules/tr46/package.json\n./node_modules/typescript/package.json\n./node_modules/update-browserslist-db/package.json\n./node_modules/vite/package.json\n./node_modules/vite/types/package.json\n./node_modules/vitest/package.json\n./node_modules/w3c-xmlserializer/package.json\n./node_modules/webidl-conversions/package.json\n./node_modules/whatwg-mimetype/package.json\n./node_modules/whatwg-url/package.json\n./node_modules/why-is-node-running/package.json\n./node_modules/ws/package.json\n./node_modules/xml-name-validator/package.json\n./node_modules/xmlchars/package.json\n./node_modules/yallist/package.json\n./package-lock.json\n./package.json\n./packages/sdk-go/README.md\n./packages/sdk-go/client.go\n./packages/sdk-go/client_test.go\n./packages/sdk-go/go.mod\n./scripts/verify_repository.py\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}
